### Tests

### Checklist

- [ ] I've read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] If this touches the parser: I've cross-checked the format fact
      against at least two independent FLPs
- [ ] If this adds a new human-readable label: I've kept the wording
      consistent with surrounding labels (tense, punctuation, etc.)
